title: Add Pydantic structured output validation for agent responses
source: CrewAI 2025/2026 best practice — Pydantic output validation
description: Replace fragile regex parsing in parse_agent_output() with Pydantic model validation. Current regex frequently fails; agents could return invalid status values.
proposed_changes: Add schemas.py with Pydantic BaseModel classes (AgentOutput, MeeseeksOutput, TeamUpdate). Update prompts to output JSON blocks. Try JSON extraction first, fall back to regex.
